self_report.viz_verdict: The shaded signed area of [4/9 - (2x-3x^3)] from 0 to 2/3 evaluates to ≈ -1.2e-17, so the positive lobe (area A) exactly cancels the negative lobe (area B), confirming area(A)=area(B).
self_report.notes: Setting ∫₀^{x₂}[c - (2x-3x³)]dx = 0 with x₂ on the curve gives x₂ = 2/3 and c = 2(2/3) - 3(2/3)³ = 4/9, matching the classical Putnam 1993 A1 solution and confirmed numerically by the shaded plot.
